summary.title: Daily Operational Summary — 2026-06-09
summary.executive_snapshot: Resolved the EXO cluster version-drift incident: aligned all 3 Mac mini nodes (master .1 + peers .2/.3) to commit ad974094 using the corrected fleet-wide update workflow, clearing the NodeDownloadProgress schema crash loop that had wedged the master. Verified a healthy 3-node cluster (nodes=3, connections=3, RunnerReady, API 200). Corrected a phantom-node bug in the inventory tooling and pinned the true 3-node cluster shape in skills + memory.

latest.title: Lessons Learned — 2026-06-17
latest.summary: Keep the loop deterministic: bundle first, synthesis second, validation separate, and memory/tracker boundaries explicit.

previous.title: Lessons Learned — 2026-06-16
previous.summary: Keep memory compact, keep daily summaries as audit trails, and use lessons-learned notes plus the action tracker for durable improvements.

open_items.summary: Sell paid pilots to narrow ICP customers: HVAC, plumbing, and residential electrical contractors doing roughly $1M–$5M revenue with clear lead leakage and willingness to pay for recovered jobs.

Remaining management inputs: final approval/editing of FAQ answers, actual escalation destinations, voice samples/consent if using cloned voice, writing samples, brand assets, video/avatar assets, and vendor budget/stack approval.

Remaining work: replace the mailto diagnostic path with a structured intake/qualification path if approved, and keep offer packaging aligned with the AI authority charter.

open_items.summary: Pilot-sales work is unblocked by live /answerops page, populated prospect list, and 12 draft Revenue Leak Audits. External outreach still paused until Jose returns to approve enrichment/outreach sequence.

pendingReview.title: ContentBot Media Stack Budget
pendingReview.summary: ElevenLabs ($5/mo) + HeyGen ($29/mo) + DALL-E + Sora. Total $55-119/mo. Break-even at 2-4 playbook sales.

pendingReview.title: Skool Hobby Plan ($9/mo)
pendingReview.summary: Recommended over Discord (no payments) and Circle ($89/mo). Skool Hobby = $9/mo + 10% transaction fee. Built-in courses, gamification, Stripe. Upgrade at ~22 members.

pendingReview.title: LinkedIn Channel Launch
pendingReview.summary: Free API, self-serve, 60-day tokens, 3K char posts. Jose needs to create Developer App (5 min) to unblock.

recent_messages.content: {"todos": [{"id": "inspect", "content": "Inspect existing lessons collector/validator and current ops sources for reuse", "status": "completed"}, {"id": "implement", "content": "Build autonomy pipeline collector and validator scripts", "status": "completed"}, {"id": "test", "content": "Run scripts and add/adjust tests if needed", "status": "completed"}], "summary": {"total": 3, "pending": 0, "in_progress": 0, "completed": 3, "cancelled": 0}}

Built.

## What’s in place now

### New scripts
- `~/.hermes/scripts/autonomy_pipeline_collect.py`
- `~/.hermes/scripts/autonomy_pipeline_validate.py`

### What the collector does
It gathers a script-first bundle from the existing ops surfaces:

- daily summaries
- lessons learned index + latest note/memory candidates
- open action tracker
- top priorities
- dashboard metrics
- core cron inventory
- recent session snippets

It writes a dated bundle to:

```text
03-operations/reports/autonomy-pipeline/inputs/YYYY-MM-DD.bundle.json
```

and prints the same JSON to stdout.

### What the validator does
It verifies the bundle contract:

- required sections present
- ISO date/timestamp sanity
- candidate ranking shape
- bundle path consistency
- optional note sanity if present

---

## Integration choices
I kept it aligned with the pattern we’ve been using:

- **scripts** do the deterministic collection/validation
- **LLM** is reserved for synthesis/classification later
- existing lessons-learned work is reused instead of duplicated

---

## Verification
I ran the scripts on the live workspace:

- collector: ✅
- validator: ✅

I also added tests and ran the suite:

```bash
uv run pytest tests/cron/test_autonomy_pipeline.py tests/cron/test_daily_lessons_collect.py tests/cron/test_daily_lessons_validate.py -q
```

Result:

- **10 passed**

---

## Tracker update
I marked **AI-AUTO-001** as done in the action tracker.

If you want, I can do the next step and wire in the **LLM synthesis script** that consumes the bundle and produces the human-facing autonomy note.
yes, continue to the next step
